title: A Moon Star Is Born
overview: Usagi Tsukino is a 14-year-old schoolgirl who is very cheerful, but clumsy and is always finding herself into unwanted trouble. One day, Usagi meets a talking black cat named Luna, who reveals that dark forces are threatening the lives of the innocent and that Usagi has the power to stop them. Using a magical brooch, Usagi is transformed into Sailor Moon, the chosen guardian who fights for love and justice.

title: Punishment Awaits: The House of Fortune Is the Monster Mansion
overview: The boys at Usagi's school are misbehaving, and it may have something to do with the mysterious new fortune teller in town.

title: Talk Radio
overview: All the girls in town are tuning in to the late-night radio program called "Midnight Zero" that reads out love letters sent in by the listeners. Meanwhile, a strange sleeping sickness is plaguing the town, causing people to fall into a coma-like state, including Ms. Haruna and Naru.

title: Slim City
overview: Usagi is shocked to find out that she's gained weight from too much eating. Determined to get back into shape and fast, she and her friends join a gym that advertises instant results for its members.

title: Scent of a Monster: Chanela Will Steal Your Love
overview: Usagi tries to convince her parents to let her adopt Luna, but her brother Shingo has a great disliking of Luna and slight ailurophobia. Later, a mysterious new pet store opens in town which is selling strange new creatures that put Shingo and everyone else who gets one into a hypnotic trance.

title: Protect the Melody of Love: Usagi Plays Cupid
overview: Usagi befriends Yusuke Amade, a jazz musician who is being followed by a Youma, and helps him confess to the woman he loves.

title: So You Want to Be a Superstar
overview: Usagi and Naru both dream of becoming stars like Mikan Shiritori, a graduate from their school. When the girls hear that Mikan is holding a talent contest, they see their chance to achieve stardom.

title: Computer School Blues
overview: The Sailor Guardians go to the Dream Land amusement park, where visitors have reportedly gone missing. The team splits into two groups: Usagi and Rei and Ami and Luna. But, much to Rei's frustration, Usagi is more focused on playing than finding the missing people.

title: Time Bomb
overview: Usagi and Ami go to the city to enjoy some shopping, where they find a clock store selling a clock that resembles Luna. Later that day, Usagi is happy to learn that her mother bought the exact same clock as a gift. But that night, the clocks from the store emit a strange light, making Usagi and the rest of Tokyo very impatient.

title: An Uncharmed Life
overview: Several people who take the bus near the Hikawa Shrine have gone missing. Usagi, Ami, and Luna decide to investigate by visiting the shrine. There, they meet Rei Hino, a shrine maiden with strong spiritual powers.

title: Nightmare in Dreamland
overview: Queen Beryl is increasingly furious with Jadeite for his repeated failures; he starts up a theme park, but the general public notices the large number of disappearances. Usagi and Rei, who is now Sailor Mars, begin their combative friendship.

title: Cruise Blues
overview: One of Queen Beryl's youma offers to help Jadeite with his wicked plans. Rei wins tickets on a luxury cruise ship and, since she has no boyfriend, asks Ami to accompany her. A jealous Usagi sneaks aboard after them.

title: Fight to the Finish
overview: Usagi continues to be attracted to both Motoki and Tuxedo Mask. Threatened with Eternal Sleep if should he fail again, Jadeite confronts the Sailor Guardians at an airport.

title: Match Point for Sailor Moon
overview: Nephrite is appointed as Jadeite's successor and begins selecting individual targets for energy, the first one being Naru's friend Rui.

title: An Unnatural Phenomena
overview: Rei falls for Mamoru and persuades him to go on a date with her, whilst Nephrite targets the caretaker of a local park.

title: Wedding Day Blues
overview: Usagi decides to enter a homemade wedding dress contest, while her home economics teacher is targeted by Nephrite.

title: Shutter Bugged
overview: Nephrite targets a gifted young photographer, while Usagi tries to achieve her dream of becoming a model.

title: Dangerous Dollies
overview: Shingo upsets his friend Mika, an award-winning doll maker whose skills make her the next target for Nephrite's energy gathering.

title: Who Is That Masked Man?
overview: Nephrite takes advantage of Sailor Moon's attraction to Tuxedo Mask by sending love letters to Usagi and her classmates. Naru falls in love with him in his civilian disguise, allowing him to drain a large amount of her energy.

title: The Summer, the Beach, Youth and Ghosts
overview: Usagi, Ami, Rei, and Luna take a vacation in order to train, but the hotel they have booked is haunted by a strange phenomenon.

title: An Animated Mess
overview: Nephrite uses his most powerful Youma to target an animator working for the new Sailor V movie.

title: Worth a Princess' Ransom
overview: Both Luna and Queen Beryl wonder if a visiting princess could be the one the Sailor Senshi has been looking for. Mamoru dreams he is Tuxedo Mask and a girl is asking him for the Silver Crystal. At the ball, Usagi gets her first kiss.

title: Molly's Folly
overview: Zoisite decides to use Nephrite's recently discovered romantic feelings for Naru to manipulate him into handing over the Black Crystal to him.

title: A Friend in Wolf's Clothing
overview: Still in love with Nephrite, Naru becomes an unwilling tool in the power struggle between Nephrite and Zoisite.

title: Jupiter Comes Thundering In
overview: Queen Beryl partially awakens the evil entity Metalia and sends Zoisite and Kunzite to find the Seven Great Youma and their Rainbow Crystals. Meanwhile, the tomboyish Makoto Kino transfers into Usagi's school and falls for a crane-game whiz at the arcade.

title: The Power of Friendship
overview: Naru is still very depressed after Nephrite's death. Usagi and Umino decide to take her to Yokohama to cheer her up. There, a kindly priest is attacked by Zoisite. Mamoru realizes that he is Tuxedo Mask, and drops a locket on the ground, where Usagi finds it.

title: Mercury's Mental Match
overview: Ami meets Ryo Urawa, a clairvoyant boy who has a crush on her. However, Urawa's power makes him aware that he will soon be transformed into a Youma by Zoisite.

title: An Artful Attack
overview: Usagi and Mamoru are asked to model for the reclusive painter Yumemi Yumeno, who is unexpectedly targeted by Zoisite.

title: Too Many Girlfriends
overview: Makoto, like Usagi, develops a crush on Motoki. The two then decide to pursue him simultaneously, even after finding out that he has a girlfriend, who, meanwhile, is targeted by Zoisite and Kunzite.

title: Grandpa's Follies
overview: After fighting off an attack by Zoisite, Rei's grandfather takes on an apprentice and begins acting strangely.

title: Kitty Chaos
overview: Luna discovers that she has an admirer, in the form of an overweight tomcat named Rhett Butler. Meanwhile, the Sailor Guardians and Zoisite compete for the last Rainbow Crystal.

title: Tuxedo Melvin
overview: Umino misinterprets Usagi's advice on seducing Naru, and begins to adopt the persona of Tuxedo Mask.

title: Sailor V Makes the Scene
overview: Zoisite disguises himself as Sailor Moon to lure Tuxedo Mask and the Sailor Guardians out into the open. The Dark Kingdom injures Tuxedo Mask's identity, but they are foiled by the appearance of Sailor Venus.

title: A Crystal Clear Destiny
overview: Mamoru is forced to confront Zoisite in a duel over the Rainbow Crystals, but Usagi inadvertently becomes involved.

title: A Reluctant Princess
overview: Usagi and Mamoru remember their former lives as Princess Serenity and Prince Endymion. The Dark Kingdom kidnaps the injured Mamoru, but Queen Beryl executes Zoisite for his attempt to kill him. Luna and Artemis tell the Sailor Guardians about their tragic past.

title: Bad Hair Day
overview: Minako tries to cheer Usagi up by taking her to a hair salon, leading to the discovery that Tuxedo Mask is still alive, but now very different.

title: Little Miss Manners
overview: Determined to become more like the princess she is supposed to be, Usagi decides to enlist in Countess Rose's Princess Seminar.

title: Ski Bunny Blues
overview: Usagi and her friends visit the Moonlight Course skiing resort, unaware that Kunzite has sabotaged the Moon Princess Contest in order to unmask Sailor Moon.

title: Ice Princess
overview: After discovering that the Moon Princess was once known for her graceful ice skating, Kunzite tries to use this information to trap Sailor Moon. The best skater among the girls, however, turns out to be Makoto. Tuxedo Mask appears to help them, but only because he does not agree with Kunzite's method of involving bystanders.

title: Last Resort
overview: Usagi and her family visit a hot springs resort, while Endymion is sent to resurrect an ancient legendary monster.

title: Tuxedo Unmasked
overview: Queen Beryl orders the seven people gathered who had carried Rainbow Crystals, intending to combine them into one huge youma. Ami is determined to protect Urawa. Sailor Moon tries to heal Endymion.

title: Sailor Venus' Past: Minako's Tragic Love
overview: Kunzite probes Sailor V's connection with the Sailor Senshi by targeting Katarina, an old acquaintance of Minako's.

title: Fractious Friends
overview: On orders from Queen Beryl, Kunzite and his Youma investigate the rumors of a rift between Sailor Moon and the other Inner Sailor Guardians, who seem to want both the mystical Moon Stick and the Silver Crystal for themselves.

title: The Past Returns
overview: A blast of energy sends the Guardians to the ruined Moon Kingdom, where they meet a hologram of Queen Serenity and learn about their past. Luna and Artemis find the entrance to the Dark Kingdom. Kunzite attacks, but is finally defeated by Sailor Moon.

title: Day of Destiny (1)
overview: After defeating Kunzite, regaining their past memories, and discovering the Dark Kingdom's hideout the Sailor Senshi head for the enemy, but they must prepare for the ultimate sacrifice.

title: Day of Destiny (2)
overview: With her friends killed, Sailor Moon is transported inside the Dark Kingdom to face Queen Beryl and the brainwashed Prince Endymion.

title: The Return of Sailor Moon
overview: Two mysterious aliens show up in town and Luna and Artemis restore Usagi's memories of being Sailor Moon

title: So You Want to Be In Pictures
overview: Ali and En target a TV company who have invited Ami, Rei, Makoto, Minako and Naru for auditions. Luna and Artemis are forced to consider restoring the memories of the rest of the Sailor Team.

title: A Knight to Remember
overview: Makoto is forced to donate blood after her childhood friend is injured by a Cardian. Meanwhile, the mysterious Moonlight Knight appears in the midst of battle to help the Sailor Team.

title: VR Madness
overview: Usagi visits the new Virtual Reality Theatre with Mamoru unaware that it is the next target for Ali and En's energy harvesting operations.

title: Cherry Blossom Time
overview: A powerful Cardian attacks a cherry blossom viewing party, and Sailor Moon is suddenly unable to fight it.

title: Kindergarten Chaos
overview: Minako becomes entangled with a kindergarten student who worships Sailor Moon, just as the aliens chose to target younger victims for their energy.

title: Much Ado About Baby Sitting
overview: Ali and En are now targeting babies as a source of energy. When a baby's mother is attacked and in the hospital Mamoru and Usagi have to look after the child.

title: Raye's Day in the Spotlight
overview: Rei takes up songwriting for a school event. Ail and An target the event for its abundance of energy but end up getting parts in the play themselves.

title: Food Fetish
overview: Makoto develops a crush on Seijuro while Ami investigates the possibility that he is the Moonlight Knight.

title: Mirror, Mirror on the Wall
overview: Some of Mamoru's college friends put on a production of Snow White and Usagi and her friends are only ones left to be in it. An assures she will be Snow White since Mamoru will be the prince, Ail becomes jealous and sends in a Cardian to attack.

title: Detention Doldrums
overview: After Usagi is caught eating in class and An talks about to a teacher the two find themselves in detention and to survive An decides to steal her energy. Meanwhile, Ail faces off with the other Sailor Senshi using another Cardian.

title: Secret Garden
overview: When the Makai Tree seems it is close to dying, Ail and An begin to steal even more energy but are horrified when the tree does not respond to the energy. Usagi pays the siblings a visit and is attacked by the Makai Tree.

title: Treed
overview: The Sailor Guardians have to save Usagi and Mamoru from the Makai Tree and in the process, Ail and An find out Sailor Moon's true identity.

title: Serena Times Two
overview: A strange child, claiming to be called Usagi Tsukino, appears from the sky and demands the Silver Crystal from Usagi.

title: The Cosmetics Caper
overview: Mamoru begins to experience bizarre visions, which prompt him to break up with Usagi. Meanwhile, Berthier begins to spread Dark Power via a cosmetics store.

title: Sailor Mercury Moving On?
overview: Ami considers leaving Japan and her life as a Sailor Guardian behind to study medicine abroad in Germany. Meanwhile, Berthier takes over Bob-Floy, an ice cream store, to spread Dark Power.

title: Gramps in a Pickle
overview: Rei's grandfather tries to get more girls into the shrine, but Koan targets it in its role as a Star Point.

title: Trouble Comes Thundering In
overview: In an attempt to 'smoke' Chibi-Usa out, Petz's droid creates a thunderstorm in hopes it will cause her strong magical energy to the peak.

title: A Charmed Life
overview: Makoto and Minako get into a fight and refuse to speak to each other, while Calaveras and Petz take over a Crystal Point, a fortune-telling and jewelry store, to spread dark power.

title: A Curried Favor
overview: Usagi and Chibi-Usa decide to make curry together for a party at her school, but the Juban Supermarket becomes targeted by Calaveras and Petz.

title: The Beach, the Island and a Vacation: The Guardians' Break
overview: The Senshi go on vacation to a remote island, where Chibi-Usa makes a new friend.

title: Naughty N' Nice
overview: Wiseman predicts that Chibi-Usa will appear, so Rubeus sends the Spectre Sisters to capture her, leading to a battle with the Sailor Team.

title: Prediction of Doom
overview: Sailor Moon is attacked by a Droid who locks her in a nightmare, and the only one who can wake her is Tuxedo Mask.

title: Enemies No More
overview: Koan makes a final bid to kill Chibi-Usa, convinced she can win Rubeus' heart. However, she faces unexpected opposition from Sailor Mars, and is shocked to be rejected by Rubeus.

title: Checkmate
overview: Ami enters an international chess tournament at the Chess Tower, and discovers that Berthier has targeted the building.

title: Sibling Rivalry
overview: Spurred on by Wiseman, Rubeus sends Calaveras and Petz on a suicide mission to kill the Sailor Senshi and Chibi-Usa.

title: Rubeus Evens the Score
overview: After discovering that he is to be withdrawn, Rubeus resorts to desperate measures to kill Chibi-Usa, and succeeds in abducting the Sailor Team.

title: Rubeus Strikes Out
overview: With the rest of the Sailor Team captured by Rubeus, Sailor Moon plans a rescue, and is taken aboard the UFO for a final showdown.

title: The Secret of the Luna Sphere
overview: Chibi-Usa becomes ill suddenly, her mind invaded by the power of the Evil Black Crystal. Sailor Pluto, a Sailor Senshi from the future, appears to the Sailor Team to offer her help.

title: Emerald Takes Over
overview: Esmeraude begins her attack on twentieth century Tokyo, attempting to nurture a Dark Henge on a Negative Point inside a cake shop.

title: Promises Fulfilled
overview: While Esmeraude targets the latest craze, promise rings, Usagi has a dream that may explain why Mamoru has been acting coldly towards her.

title: No Thanks, Nurse Venus
overview: Esmeraude releases a virulent strain of influenza into Tokyo, and only Minako and Chibi-Usa seem unaffected.

title: Dog Day for Artemis
overview: After Luna wounds his pride one too many times, Artemis sets out on a mission to prove his worth, and stumbles upon Esmeraude's latest plot.

title: Lonely Amy
overview: Esmeraude attacks a local cram school, altering the behavior of the students there. When Ami investigates, she is subjected to a series of hallucinations by Esmeraude's Droid.

title: Child's Play
overview: Esmeraude attacks two targets simultaneously, creating chaos in Chibi-Usa's school, and the Sailor Team face off against her two Droids.

title: Future Shocked
overview: The Sailor Team accompany Chibi-Usa into the Space-Time Corridor, where they are attacked by Esmeraude and her Droid.

title: Legend of the Negamoon
overview: The Sailor Team arrive in the thirtieth century with Chibi-Usa, where they are met by King Endymion, Mamoru's future self.

title: Jealousy's Just Rewards
overview: Chibi-Usa falls under the control of Wiseman, while Esmeraude resolves to kill Sailor Moon and win Prince Dimande's heart by any means necessary.

title: Birth of the Wicked Lady
overview: Chibi-Usa is kidnapped by Wiseman. Who brainwashes her into thinking her parents don't love her and transforms her into a villain called Black Lady.

title: Brotherly Love
overview: Saphir discovers that Wiseman has been plotting against the Black Moon Clan, and races to warn his brother of the betrayal.

title: Diamond in the Rough
overview: The Sailor Senshi go inside the growing Evil Black Crystal fragment, where Sailor Moon finally confronts Prince Dimande.

title: Final Battle
overview: Sailor Moon faces Black Lady, as Wiseman prepares to fire the power of the Evil Black Crystal through the Dark Gate and destroy the Earth.

title: Follow the Leader
overview: The Sailor Team present a preview of the forthcoming season, and debate the prospect of selecting a new leader.

title: Star Struck, Bad Luck
overview: After she experiences apocalyptic visions, Rei is attacked by an extremely powerful monster that Sailor Moon cannot fight.

title: Crystal Clear Again
overview: A young girl is attacked by a Daimon, but Usagi is no longer able to transform into Sailor Moon, and the overpowered Sailor Team must one again rely on the mysterious new Sailor Senshi.

title: Driving Dangerously
overview: Usagi and Minako become besotted with Haruka Tenou, an attractive and sophisticated boy...or so they believe.

title: Bad Harmony
overview: Concerned that she is not intelligent enough for the sophisticated Mamoru, Usagi seeks advice from Michiru.

title: Swept of Her Feet
overview: Usagi's friend, Unazuki, is attacked by a Daimon and has her Pure Heart Crystal. After the crystal is dropped, Sailor Moon must race to find it and save Unazuki.

title: Blinded by Love's Light
overview: Naru and Umino enter an Affection Contest in order to prove their love for each other, but find themselves targeted by a Daimon.

title: Lita Borrows Trouble
overview: Makoto is targeted by a Daimon, but manages to evade it. Haruka befriends Makoto in order to get close to her and her pure heart crystal.

title: Damp Spirits
overview: Ami's desire to avoid competition leads to her offending Michiru during a swimming race. Meanwhile, a Daimon selects Ami as her target.

title: Friendly Foes
overview: After Sailor Neptune is captured and possibly killed by Kaolinite, Sailor Moon and Sailor Uranus find themselves shackled together and are forced to reassess their attitudes toward each tower.

title: A Man’s Kindness! Yuichiro, Heartbroken by Rei?
overview: Worried by Rei's increasingly intensive meditation, Yuuichirou becomes concerned that she has fallen for another man. When he sees her with Haruka, he is convinced that she is Rei's new suitor.

title: Individual Happiness
overview: inako becomes despondent about her life as a Sailor Venus. Meanwhile, an old friend of hers is attacked by Daimon.

title: Birthday Blues (1)
overview: Usagi is mad at Mamoru for not knowing its her birthday, but feels guilty because she realizes she never told him when it was. For her birthday, Mamo gets her glass slippers, but the Heart Daimon egg is inside.

title: Birthday Blues (2)
overview: Sailor Moon's heart crystal was almost stolen. Neptune and Uranus restore it, and the senshi know they are Michiru and Haruka. A battle with Kaori, causes her to fall down to her death and well, she dies.

title: Hello, Sailor Mini Moon
overview: Chibiusa comes to town during a carnival, where all the senshi are working. A singer for the carnival in Eugeal's target, and she is attacked...and all the senshi, including Chibiusa as Chibi Moon, fight to save her heart.

title: Tainted Tea Party
overview: Lonely Chibiusa looks for friends, and when she finds one...it's a target, so they must help to save his heart.

title: People Who Need People
overview: Makoto loses a fight, and decides to go to a training place with one of the smartest and most courageous trainers of all time, and the girls follow. The master happens to be a target, and they must save his heart as soon as they can, but Jupiter is especially on the job.

title: Related by Destiny
overview: Haruka thinks about old times, while Usagi and the inners explore their soon-to-be high school, where they meet Haruka's old racing friend, Elsa Gray...who is a target. Uranus and Neptune, along with the inners, fight to save her heart against the daimon, and her heart is not pure, so it is restored.

title: Art Appreciation
overview: Chibiusa develops a crush on Masanori, the young sculptor in her art class. However, Masanori seems more interested in Michiru.

title: Everything's Coming Up Rosey
overview: Usagi and her friends are invited to a party for foreign university students, but her enthusiasm is tempered by the knowledge that most of the conversation will be in English.

title: No Turning Back
overview: Minako realizes that she is the only one of the Sailor Team not to have been targeted for her Pure Heart Crystal, and takes increasingly absurd measures to prove her purity.

title: Destiny's Arrival
overview: The time has come! Eugeal wants a fight with Neptune and Uranus, and they will sacrifice even each other to get the talismans. But then they learn that they, and Pluto, hold the talismans. Neptune's Mirror, Uranus' Sword and Pluto's Garnet Orb.

title: The Purity Chalice
overview: Sailor Pluto appears and reawakens Sailor Uranus and Sailor Neptune, and the three talismans resonate with each other (The third being Pluto's Garnet Orb). The Holy Grail appears, and Sailor Moon drives Eudial out. Mimete kills Eudial by sabotaging her car.

title: Show Stoppers
overview: Chibi-Usa meets up with Hotaru Tomoe, who has quite a darkside.

title: Rini's Risky Friendship
overview: Usagi discovers that Kaori is alive and posing as Tomoe maid. Does Hotaru have anything to do with the messiah?

title: Mimet's Mess
overview: Mimet is a fan of idols. Will this affect her abilities as a Death Buster?

title: The Shadow of Silence
overview: Hotaru over-exerts herself and is taken to hospital, while Mimete targets a television actor for his Pure Heart Crystal.

title: Thorny Weather
overview: Chibiusa invites Hotaru on a picnic at a local botanical garden, not realizing that the resident botanist is the next target of the Death Busters.

title: Heightened Hazard
overview: Everyone begins to learn more about the outer soliders through Mamoru's story.

title: It's in the Cards
overview: When Mimete decides to help in the production of a Daimon, she accidentally creates an anomaly that fractures the dimensions inside the Tomoe residence, trapping Chibiusa and Hotaru.

title: Goodness Eclipsed
overview: Chibiusa invites Hotaru to a show at the planetarium, while Mimete plans to steal the Pure Heart Crystal of the DJ Thomas Harris.

title: Next in Line
overview: After Hotaru and her father disappear from their house, the Sailor Senshi infiltrate Mugen Academy, suspicious that it is connected to the Death Busters.

title: Friendly Ferns
overview: Tellu opens a store selling Telluns, plants designed to remove Pure Heart Crystals. Meanwhile, Hotaru wakes up, confused, in the Messiah of Silence's chamber.

title: The Science of Love
overview: With the latest round of national Patrice exams being held at Mugen Academy, the Sailor Team infiltrate the school and Ami encounters her academic rival, Yui Bidou.

title: Wake Up Call
overview: Cyprine, the last of the Witches 5, summons Mugen Academy's students in order to remove their Pure Heart Crystal, while Kaolinite targets Chibiusa.

title: Who's Really Who?
overview: The Sailor Senshi approach Mugen Academy in order to save Chibiusa and defeat the Death Busters, while Mistress 9 plans to steal the Holy Grail from Sailor Moon.

title: Darkness, My Old Friend
overview: Mistress 9 steals the Holy Grail, allowing Pharaoh 90 to pass through the portal to Earth. The fate of the world rests in the hands of the Senshi of Ruin, Sailor Saturn.

title: Second Chance
overview: The Death Busters have been defeated, but Hotaru is reduced to infancy and Sailor Pluto's whereabouts are still unknown. Meanwhile, Haruka and Michiru have one last mission before they leave Azabu-Juban.

title: Tough Kindness
overview: A final Daimon emerges from the rubble of Mugen Academy and begins to steal pure hearts. Chibiusa leaves for the future, and comes back just in time to help destroy the Daimon.

title: Dreams Take Flight
overview: During a solar eclipse, a mysterious floating circus tent appears in the sky over Tokyo. Meanwhile, Chibiusa is fascinated by a Pegasus who appears to her in a dream.

title: No Ordinary Horsepower
overview: When Reika returns from Africa, Usagi becomes concerned that she and Motoki are having relationship problems. Meanwhile, Tiger's Eye selects Reika as a target.

title: Sweet Dreams
overview: When Ikuko is attacked by Hawk's Eye, Sailor Moon must once again rely on the mysterious Pegasus for assistance.

title: Baiting the Trap
overview: When Hawk's Eye announces he has designed a system to trap Pegasus, Tiger's Eye approaches Naru with the intention of using her as bait.

title: The Perfect Couple
overview: Chibiusa worries that Saori, a friend of Mamoru's from college, is romantically interested in him.

title: Much Ado About Kitten
overview: Rumors of Artemis' interest in other women spiral out of control after a small talking kitten appears, claiming that Artemis is her father.

title: A Pegasus Page Turner
overview: Usagi and Chibiusa are excited to discover that a best-selling book was written by an old friend of Makoto's.

title: A Teacher's Lesson
overview: Tiger's Eye targets Chibiusa's art teacher in the hopes of attacking Pegasus and finding his host.

title: The Trouble with Love
overview: Mamoru moves into the Hikawa Shrine after his apartment is wrecked, so Usagi assumes the guise of a ninja to protect his honor.

title: Phony Fairy
overview: Chibi-Usa befriends a young man, an artist fixated on the existence of fairies, who is targeted by Fish-eye.

title: Driven Dreamer
overview: Ami befriends Mamoru's colleague Natsumi, a widow who is trying to restore a classic car.

title: Cutting It Close
overview: A young girl with dreams of being the strongest swordsman in Japan is targeted by Tiger's Eye.

title: Clothes Call
overview: Fisheye targets the fashion designer Yoshiki Usui, while Usagi hopes to persuade the designer to make her a wedding dress for free.

title: Double Trouble
overview: Usagi and the girls are shocked to find out that Minako is dating two boys at the same time, but little does anymore realize that her suitors are Tiger's Eye and Hawk's Eye.

title: Recipe for Danger
overview: The girls become interested in an apparently antisocial old woman after she takes Diana into her home.

title: Kickin' into High Gear
overview: Reports begin to flood in of a Pegasus wreaking havoc in the city. Meanwhile, a popular boy shows an interest in Chibiusa.

title: Beach Blanket Bungle
overview: Shingo develops a crush on Ami during a trip to the beach, while Tiger's Eye plot to seduce her.

title: Tutu Treachery
overview: Usagi begins ballet lesson in the hope of becoming a prima. Fisheye enrolls in the same class, and soon catches the eye of the instructor.

title: The Duchess's Day Off
overview: Usagi and Chibiusa are befriended by a mysterious foreign woman who accompanies them to the Azabu-Juuban summer festival. Unbeknownst to them, their acquaintance is a visiting princess who is being pursed by both her government and Hawk's Eye.

title: No Prince Charming
overview: Tiger's Eye plans to seduce the girls at a university dance party, while Makoto is immediately smitten with the charming stranger.

title: A True Reflection
overview: While Fisheye targets Mamoru, Queen Nehellenia appears before the Amazon Trio and warns them that without the Golden Crystal, they will soon revert to their animal forms.

title: Eternal Dreams
overview: Fisheye discovers Chibiusa communicating with Pegasus, but refuses to cooperate with Zirconia's plans. As Hawk's Eye pursues Usagi for her Dream Mirror, Zirconia decides that the Amazon Trio have outlived their usefulness.

title: A New Nightmare
overview: Zirconia sends the Amazoness Quartet in search of the Golden Mirror, and their first target is Chibiusa's friend Momoko.

title: Heartfelt Melody
overview: Ami becomes obsessed with a tune she found on the internet, and writes lyrics to it. Meanwhile, VesVes of the Amazoness Quartet targets the tune's composer.

title: Dreams of Her Own
overview: Rei becomes a celebrity after being featured in a magazine article, and gains a dedicated young fan called Nanako.

title: Dental Dilemma
overview: When Usagi and ChibiUsa need to go to dentist, they try a new office which has opened in the neighborhood, but is it a trap?

title: Nightmare Garden
overview: Makoto and Minako both fall for an attractive kindergarten teacher, but Minako's all-out attempts to ingratiate herself with him soon annoyed to Makoto.

title: Vaulting to Victory
overview: On the eve of his school's athletic meet, Kyuusuke worries about the box horse, the one obstacle he is unable to clear. JunJun approaches him with the intention of taking his Dream Mirror, and offers to be his coach.

title: Reflections of Reality
overview: Usagi and Chibiusa befriend Kamoi, a starving young artist, who is later targeted by CereCere.

title: Dream Believer
overview: While VesVes targets an eccentric acquaintance of Chibiusa's who is trying to make a flying machine, Chibiusa worries that Pegasus does not trust her.

title: Pegasus Revealed
overview: PallaPalla's magic causes Usagi and Chibiusa to switch ages, turning Usagi into a child and Chibiusa into a teenager. While Chibiusa is thrilled with her new body, she is distressed to discover that she can no longer call Pegasus.

title: Rini's Lovely Rhapsody
overview: As Chibiusa becomes even more enamoured of Helios, Usagi and her friends realise that she is in love, and are determined to discover the identity of her crush.

title: Tomorrow's Big Dreams
overview: Usagi and her friends, along with the Amazoness Quartet, assist in the organization of a coming-of-age ceremony.

title: Day of Night
overview: Intent on escaping her mirror, Queen Nehellenia causes spider webs to appear all over the city, casting it into darkness.

title: Show Time Showdown
overview: The Sailor Team infiltrate the Dead Moon Circus and are confronted by Zirconia.

title: The Dark Legend
overview: After being captured by Queen Nehellenia, Sailor Chibi Moon confronts the evil queen.

title: One in the Hand
overview: Queen Nehellenia forces Helios to return to his body and give up the Golden Crystal, allowing the evil queen to break free from her mirror.

title: Golden Revival
overview: Queen Nehellenia, free from her mirror at last, prepares to use the power of the Golden Crystal.

title: The Sweetest Dream
overview: Queen Nehellenia makes a desperate last stand as the Golden Crystal destroys the Dead Moon Circus.

title: The Flower of Nightmares Scatters: The Queen of Darkness Returns
overview: As Usagi and her friends begin high school, a mysterious force releases Queen Nehellenia from her mirror, encouraging her to take revenge on them.

title: Saturn Awakens: The Ten Sailor Guardians Unite
overview: While Queen Nehellenia continues to exert her evil influence on the earth, the rapidly aging Hotaru re-awakens as Sailor Saturn.

title: The Cursed Mirror: Mamoru Caught in a Nightmare
overview: People all around Tokyo, including Mamoru, become entranced by mirrors. Usagi remembers a shadow she saw in Mamoru's mirror, and races off with the other soldiers to find him.

title: Night of Destiny: The Sailor Guardians' Ordeals
overview: Sailor Moon is left devastated after seeing Mamoru get abducted right before her very eyes. To make matters worse, Nehelenia's action is starting to cause a time paradox, which threatens to end Chibiusa's existence.

title: For Love: The Endless Battle in the Dark World
overview: Sailor Moon runs off to save Mamoru from Nehelina alone. The rest of the Sailor Guardians try to go after her, but one by one they fall victim to Nehelina's traps.

title: Moon Power of Love: The Nightmare Ends
overview: Sailor Chibi Moon and Sailor Saturn make it to Nehelinia's palace, where Mamoru is being held prisoner. But despite their best efforts, the two Guardians are unable to free him, and Sailor Chibi Moon fades from existence.

title: Farewells and Encounters: The Transitioning Stars of Destiny
overview: Mamoru tells Usagi that he's accepted an offer to study abroad in the U.S., which will force them to have a long-distance relationship. Saddened at first, Usagi eventually decides to root for her boyfriend's dream and sends him off with a smile.

title: A School Storm: The Transfer Students Are Idols
overview: Usagi runs into Seiya again and is annoyed by his cocky attitude. The next day, she is surprised to find that Seiya and the rest of the Three Lights have transferred to her school.

title: Becoming an Idol: Minako's Ambition
overview: Minako decides to work for the Three Lights as their personal assistant thinking it will help her quickly get into the entertainment industry. But Minkao soon realizes that being a star isn't all fun and glamor.

title: Fighter’s Secret Identity: The Shocking Super Transformation
overview: The Three Lights are rehearsing for their upcoming musical, which they will be starring in. But they seem to have a hard time winning the approval of the stage director, especially Seiya, who feels that he is being personally tested.

title: A Star of Dreams and Wishes: Taiki’s Transformation
overview: Ami invited Taiki to come and watch the Wataru's Comet pass by Earth with their science teacher, Amanogawa, only to be rejected.

title: Luna's Discovery: The Real Face of Yaten
overview: Yaten temporarily adopts Luna.

title: Friend or Foe? Star Lights and the Sailor Guardians
overview: Taiki asks Makoto to appear on a cooking show with him. Usagi decides to tag along, but her clumsiness creates a huge mess at the TV studio.

title: Calling of the Shining Stars: Enter Haruka and Michiru
overview: Usagi and the girls try to buy tockets to a Three Lights concert, only to learn it is already sold out. Michiru then passes by and gives them the tickets, revealing that she will be performing with the Three Lights.

title: Seiya and Usagi's Heart-Pounding Date
overview: Seiya asks Usagi on a date, to which she reluctantly agrees. Sailor Iron Mouse attempts to make up for her recent failures by going after Seiya's star seed.

title: Invaders from Outer Space: The Coming of Siren
overview: Usagi and Lina encounters a little girl who appears to be lost. The two later return home that day and are surprised to find the same girl now living in Usagi's house as her younger sister.

title: The Screaming Dead: Terror of the Camp Monster
overview: Over the summer, the girls go camping in the mountains, where they run into the Three Lights, who are there shooting for an upcoming film.

title: A Night Alone Together: Usagi in Danger
overview: When Usagi is home alone, she invites Seiya over. The other Senshi and some surprise visitors show up as well!

title: Taiki's Song Filled with Passion and Faith
overview: Taiki begins to question if their activity as the Three Lights is really helping with their goal of finding their missing princess. His frustration continues to grow, to the point where he no longer feels like singing.

title: Chibi-Chibi's Mystery: The Big Noisy Chase
overview: Lately, Chibi-Chibi has been coming home with a lot of snacks. Curious to know where she's been getting all the snacks from, Usagi and the girls decide to follow Chibi-Chibi around for the day.

title: The Shining Power of a Star: Chibi-Chibi's Transformation
overview: Usagi finds herself teamed up with Seiya for the annual school softball tournament. To make matters worse, Isagi becomes a target of Seiya's fans, who think she is hitting on him.

title: Invitation to Terror: Usagi's Night Flight
overview: Sailor Aluminum Siren learns that Usagi is Sailor Moon. Using this knowledge, she sets a trap on a plane where the Three Lights are holding an in-flight event in order to get Usagi's attention.

title: Duty or Friendship: Conflict Between the Sailor Guardians
overview: The Inner Senshi and the Starlights learn each others real identities, but distrust each other, Usagi and Seiya try to bring both groups together.

title: Truth Revealed: The Star Lights' Past
overview: Seiya and Usagi try to stay together after the Outer Senshi and the other two Starlights forbid them from seeing each other.

title: Butterflies of Light: A New Chapter on the Horizon
overview: Ami and the others try to clear up the misunderstanding the Three Lights have about Usagi but are unable to get in touch with them. As a last resort, the girls decide to enter a video game tournament where the winner gets a chance to speak with Taiki.

title: Go for Your Dream: Minako Becomes an Idol
overview: Minako is close to realizing her lifelong dream of become an idol after making it to the final round of auditions in a talent-search contest. But Minako is now thinking of turning down the offer, as she cannot ignore her duty as a Sailor Guardian.

title: The Stolen Silver Crystal: Princess Kakyu Appears
overview: Usagi and her classmates are all busy preparing for the upcoming Juban School Festival. Meanwhile, Sailor Lead Crow finds a note left behind by her deceased friend Sailor Aluminum Siren that contains information on Sailor Moon's true identity.

title: Crusade for the Galaxy: Legend of the Sailor Wars
overview: Princess Kakyu, the missing princess whom the Star Lights have long been searching for, finally appears before the Sailor Guardians. Princess Kakyu explains that she has come to Earth in search of the Light of Hope.

title: Princess Kakyu Perishes: Advent of Galaxia
overview: Usagi finally confesses to Rei that she has been unable to get in touch with Mamoru for the past several months. Meanwhile, the Three Lights publicly announce their intention to disband their group.

title: Countdown to Destruction: The Sailor Guardians' Last Battle
overview: Princess Kakyu perishes after being defeated by Galaxia. Devastated, the Sailor Star Lights go after Galaxia to avenge their fallen princess. Meanwhile, Sailor Moon and the rest of the Guardians also prepare for their battle to protect the galaxy.

title: Ruler of the Galaxy: The Menace of Galaxia
overview: Sailor Mars, Mercury, Jupiter, and Venus lose their star seeds after shielding Sailor Moon and the Star Lights from Galaxia's attack. The four Outer Guardians entrust Sailor Moon to the Star Lights while they try to stop Galaxia.

title: Dying Stars: Uranus and Neptune's Last Stand
overview: Uranus and Neptune have turned against the Sailor Guardians by swearing allegiance to Galaxia. Despite Sailor Moon's desperate plea, the two continue their attack, forcing Sailor Moon and the Star Lights to retreat.

title: The Light of Hope: Final Battle for the Galaxy
overview: Galaxia is revealed to be the Legendary Sailor Guardian who sealed away Chaos long ago. However, she has since become corrupt and has gone to conquer the galaxy herself.

title: Usagi's Love: The Moonlight Illuminates the Galaxy
overview: As Galaxia closes in to take Sailor Moon's star seed, the Light of Hope finally reveals itself. Turning into a sword, the Light of Hope begs Usagi to use its power to stop Galaxia, who is now fully consumed by Chaos.
